title: Extract Sub-item ID/Link from API
excerpt:
Hey, 
My company implemented some sub-items connecting one item column from one board to another. 
The API retrieves the following: 
{ 
“title”: “Contact”, 
“type”: “board-relation”, 
“text”: “”, 
“additional_info”: null…

posts.author: gilbi (Gil BI)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

My company implemented some sub-items connecting one item column from one board to another.
The API retrieves the following:
{
“title”: “Contact”,
“type”: “board-relation”,
“text”: “”,
“additional_info”: null,
“id”: “link_to_item5”,
“value”: “{"linkedPulseIds":[{"linkedPulseId":154982536}],"changed_at”: "2020-03-29T10:20:24.898Z"}"
}

Is there a method to connect or lookup from one board extraction to the other?

Thanks

posts.author: gilbi (Gil BI)
posts.cookedHtml: I ended up parsing out the the linkedPulseId and match it as the item ID from the other board

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @gilbi, awesome! This is how our platform does it too – we look up the other item’s data using the item ID.

We’re also working on adding support for adding subitems via the API. Stay tuned!

posts.author: amitozalvo (Amit Ozalvo)
posts.cookedHtml: Note that using the API to query subitems through the column value will not 100% work for every item. For a few items I receive less subitems than there actually are
